case_title: ALEXANDER FONTANA ET AL VS. LISA TALLEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2021 - JUDGMENT.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SFSD FILED PROOF OF SERVICE WITH A DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE. PLEASE SEE SCANNED COPY. FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00. SERVED OCT-25-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TALLEY, LISA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-01-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER FONTANA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MARTHA BOERO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LISA TALLEY IS NOT PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY HUSBAND JON DEAN. DEFENDANT JON DEAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED OCT-25-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEAN, JON
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FONTANA, ALEXANDER BOERO, MARTHA AS TO DEFENDANT TALLEY, LISA DEAN, JON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONTANA, ALEXANDER BOERO, MARTHA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TALLEY, LISA DEAN, JON $5,751.50 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,906.50, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
